docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE $30.00) SERVED NOV-27-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JIE, MU

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-15-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-15-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PARTIES ARE PRESENT IN COURT, EVIDENCE FOR BOTH PARTIES IS RETAINED, LAWRENCE LEE APPEARS WITH DEFT. MS. JIE AS A WITNESS AND A MANDARIN TRANSLATOR, NOTHING ON RECORD. CLERK-BETH WILBER (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-15-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HERRERA, MIGUEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JIE, MU THE COURT DETERMINES THAT THE TRANSACTION WAS FULLY DISCLOSED AS AN "AS-IS" SALE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HERRERA, MIGUEL AS TO DEFENDANT JIE, MU ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-15-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
